questions: how to live a minimalist life?
answers: Minimalism is about intentionally living with only the things you truly need and value. It's not about having nothing — it's about making room for what matters most.
Minimalist life shuru korte: unnecessary jinish gulo hatao, new kena te conscious hao, experiences ke things er upore priority dao, ar clutter free theko.
Benefits of minimalism include less stress, more savings, cleaner space, more time for what matters, environmental friendliness, and greater clarity about your values and goals.
Start minimalism by decluttering one area at a time — a drawer, a shelf, then a room. Ask yourself: does this add value to my life? If not, donate or discard it.
